summary: Comprehensive testing of UI Cleanup & Advanced User Management features (Iteration 8). All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified via Playwright. All APIs working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Existing users (service, can) created before full_name feature don't have full_name in DB - they display username as fallback, which is expected behavior
Dialog components show console warning about missing Description - minor accessibility issue that could be addressed
seed_data_creation: Reset passwords for existing staff users (can, service) to known values for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI Cleanup & Advanced User Management features verified working: 1) Boss dashboard shows 'Welcome, [Full Name]' not username. 2) No welcome toast on login. 3) Boss Settings has My Profile section with Full Name, Username, Password fields. 4) My Profile Save updates dashboard header reactively via refreshUser(). 5) Staff list shows Full Name as primary + @username as secondary. 6) Pencil icon opens Edit User modal with Full Name, Username, Password fields. 7) Edit User modal saves changes correctly. 8) Delete user confirmation dialog works. 9) Self-delete protection works. 10) PUT /api/users/{id}/update supports full_name, username, password changes. 11) PUT /api/users/{id}/update rejects duplicate username. 12) Driver Profile shows Full Name + Change Password form only (no user management). 13) CS Profile shows Full Name + Change Password form only (no user management). 14) Bottom nav has glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl) and safe-area-inset-bottom padding.

boss_dashboard_full_name.description: Boss dashboard shows 'Welcome, [Full Name]' not username

no_welcome_toast.verification: No toast appeared after successful login

my_profile_section.description: Boss Settings has My Profile section
my_profile_section.verification: My Profile card with Full Name, Username, Password inputs and Save Profile button

my_profile_reactive_update.description: My Profile Save updates dashboard header reactively
my_profile_reactive_update.verification: Changed name to 'Test Boss Name', dashboard immediately showed 'Welcome, Test Boss Name'

staff_list_display.verification: Staff rows show 'service' with '@service' below, 'Can' with '@can' below

edit_user_modal.description: Pencil icon opens Edit User modal
edit_user_modal.verification: Edit User dialog with Full Name, Username, Password fields and Save Changes button

edit_user_save.verification: Backend test verified full_name, username, password updates work correctly

delete_user_confirmation.verification: Delete button opens confirmation dialog with Cancel and Delete buttons

self_delete_protection.verification: Backend returns 400 with 'cannot delete your own account'

update_endpoint_full_name.verification: Backend test verified full_name update works

update_endpoint_username.verification: Backend test verified username update works

update_endpoint_password.verification: Backend test verified password update works and new password can be used to login

driver_profile_change_password.description: Driver Profile shows Change Password form only
driver_profile_change_password.verification: Driver Profile has current/new/confirm password inputs, no user management elements

cs_profile_change_password.description: CS Profile shows Change Password form only
cs_profile_change_password.verification: CS Profile has current/new/confirm password inputs, no user management elements

bottom_nav_safe_area.description: Bottom nav has safe area padding

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/auth/login: PASSED - Returns access_token and user with full_name
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/auth/me: PASSED - Returns user data with full_name
api_endpoints_tested.PUT /api/auth/password: PASSED - User can change own password
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/users/all: PASSED - Returns all users with full_name field
api_endpoints_tested.PUT /api/users/{id}/update: PASSED - Updates full_name, username, password with duplicate check
